visualizationDetails.title: Predicted Race Pace
visualizationDetails.description: Model-projected race pace and finishing spread across the full grid.

visualizationDetails.title: Predicted Lap-Time Distribution
visualizationDetails.description: Team-level distribution of projected race lap times.

visualizationDetails.title: Podium Probability Board
visualizationDetails.description: Monte-Carlo podium probabilities derived from projected pace and uncertainty.

visualizationDetails.title: Finish Probability Heatmap
visualizationDetails.description: Driver-by-position probability matrix for the top 10 finish slots.

visualizationDetails.title: Head-to-Head Edge Matrix
visualizationDetails.description: Pairwise probability that one driver finishes ahead of another.

visualizationDetails.title: Circuit Speed Map
visualizationDetails.description: FastF1-derived circuit map with corner labels and speed profile.
